cause_analysis.narrative: Esther’s beauty hair braiding & weave-in churned on 2026-02-22 after 178 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2025-12-25. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 68 times, but the client only replied 3. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
